Tesco typically offers good value, especially with their Tesco Value range. Check their weekly deals on fresh produce and meat. Their loyalty scheme (Clubcard) can save you money on regular purchases.
Tesco is known for good quality at mid-range prices. Compared to other major UK supermarkets, they offer good value, especially with their Tesco Value range.
At Tesco, I recommend trying their Tesco Finest range for premium quality, or Tesco Value for great value. Their Tesco Whole Milk is particularly good quality.

Sainsburys typically offers good value, especially with their Sainsbury's Basics range. Check their weekly deals on fresh produce and meat. Their loyalty scheme (Nectar) can save you money on regular purchases.

At Sainsburys, I recommend trying their Sainsbury's Taste the Difference range for premium quality, or Sainsbury's Basics for great value. Their Sainsbury's Salmon is particularly good quality.

At Asda, I recommend trying their Asda Extra Special range for premium quality, or Asda Smart Price for great value. Their Asda Milk is particularly good quality.
